description: Letter from the widow of the cantor Ben Nahman to a Head of the Jews (entitled Gaon) concerning the difficulties she is having with her husband's sons and their aunt over her right to domicile in the house to which she had a claim. Cf. T-S 10J16.4, an earlier plea from the same woman, also T-S Ar.18(1).107.
description_he: מכתב מאלמנת החזן בן נחמן לראש היהודים (בתואר גאון) על קשייה עם בני בעלה ועל זכות מגוריה בבית.
